message:
fix: TestRobotHealthFlagParsing now actually asserts behavior

The test previously only logged in all code paths without making any
assertions. Now it properly verifies:
- Command exits 0 for nonexistent session
- JSON response is valid
- success=false for nonexistent session
- session field matches input
- checked_at timestamp is present

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
